entries.content: intransitive verb ① (move fast) 跑 pǎo▸ she ran across the road 她跑过马路 ② (operate) «machine, engine» 运转 yùnzhuǎn▸ the engine is running smoothly 发动机运转顺畅
entries.label: A
entries.name: intransitive verb

entries.content: transitive verb ① (manage) 经营 jīngyíng ‹business, hotel›▸ she runs her own company 她经营自己的公司 ② (operate) 运行 yùnxíng ‹program, test›▸ run the program 运行程序
entries.label: B
entries.name: transitive verb

entries.content: PHRASAL VERBS run into transitive verb ① (meet by chance) 偶遇 ǒuyù▸ I ran into an old friend 我偶遇了一位老友
entries.name: PHRASAL VERBS

entries.content: ORIGIN Old English of Germanic origin.
entries.name: ORIGIN
